title: Bilgah #1083
definition:
Bilgah = "cheerfulness"

 1) a priest of the 15th course, in David's time
 2) a priest accompanying Zerubbabel
nasbUsage:
Definition: Bilgah = "cheerfulness"

 1) a priest of the 15th course, in David's time
 2) a priest accompanying Zerubbabel

    NASB:  cheerfulness, two Isr.
